subject: Weezing, two conjoined spherical gas Pokemon with scowling mouths, surrounded by toxic fumes
description: Two large round purple creatures are conjoined together, one larger and one smaller fused at the shoulder, both with wide scowling mouths open and dark rings on their surfaces. Smoky gas clouds billow around them in dark purple and grey tones, partially obscuring the scene. The overall composition is menacing, the two scowling faces giving a sense of toxic belligerence. The Japanese text on this printing confirms the card is a Chilling Reign Weezing.
foreground: two conjoined Weezing figures with open scowling mouths
